## Purpose

Describe the bounded change and why it is needed.

## Architecture and authority

- [ ] Architecture and trust boundaries are unchanged, or the exact changes are documented.
- [ ] New authority, identities, privileges, routes, migrations, or dependencies are listed.
- [ ] Prohibited work for this change remains absent.

## Implementation and validation

- [ ] Source changes are committed.
- [ ] Tests, fixtures, and expected outcomes are committed.
- [ ] Portable validation passes.
- [ ] Applicable canonical or specialized validation is identified.
- [ ] Historical predecessor handling is correct.
- [ ] No untracked or ignored project input is required.

## Documentation and evidence

- [ ] Documentation is synchronized in this change set.
- [ ] Warnings, limitations, and non-claims are updated.
- [ ] Acceptance impact is stated.
- [ ] No credential or protected data is included.
